name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: [Action alert] Trump weighs in on Roe v. Wade
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec4010/706872872/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all")
---

Hi there,

Donald Trump just made one of his first commitments as president-elect to reverse _Roe v. Wade_.

Trump appeared on "60 Minutes" this weekend and vowed to appoint anti-choice judges to the Supreme Court. And when reporter Lesley Stahl followed up to ask about the women who would be blocked from abortion access, Trump replied that women will simply "have to go to another state."

Go to another state?! Outrageous.

Make no mistake: Trump's promise is an all-out assault on women across the country. This is exactly why we must fight against him.

**[EMILY's List is committed to doing everything we can to hold the line on abortion rights. Donate $3 now to help fight back against any attacks a Trump administration makes on _Roe v. Wade_.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec4011/706872872/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161114_email_60minRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+EMILYs+List+is+committed+to+doing+everyt&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all")**

We've already seen the impact of this anti-choice agenda at the state and local level. As a member of Congress, Vice President-elect Mike Pence introduced the first measure trying to "defund" federal funding for Planned Parenthood, and after he became governor of Indiana funding for Planned Parenthood was slashed in half. As a result, he had to declare a state of emergency for an HIV outbreak in one of the very counties that lost its clinic.

That's not to mention the over 100 other clinics across the country that have been forced to close or stop offering abortions since 2011.

Women must have the ability to make the most important choices in their lives. Abortion is and must remain a right, as the court decided 44 years ago.

It's not a right when it's only available to women who can afford to take time off from work and have money to travel dozens or hundreds of miles to the nearest state with the health care they need. And it's not a right when millions of low-income women still struggle to get the health care access they need.

That's why we don't just endorse Democratic women, we endorse _pro-choice_ Democratic women. And we need champions at every level of government who will fight for us and stand up to Trump at every turn.

We're not waiting for Inauguration Day or the next election to start building a new wave of opposition to anyone who wants to strip women's rights away. We have to fight back now.

**Donate $3 now to help hold the line on _Roe v. Wade_ :**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Our-Work-Starts-Today](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec4012/706872872/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161114_email_60minRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOurWorkStartsTod&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec4013/706872872/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161114_email_60minRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec400c/706872872/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec400d/706872872/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c75be/24c69fd9/5e54553/18ec400e/706872872/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all&source=WPEFEW26N_digital_email_20161114_60minRR_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Portman for Senate
subject: an incredible race
body:
| Peter --

Last week, Rob won by a huge margin, and we could not have done it without your help. We won 84 of 88 counties, winning the state by over 1.1 million votes. It is only the second time in Ohio history that someone received over 3 million votes in a contested race. Here is a look at our campaign's highlights:

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman%2Fvideos%2F1114701445318131%2F%3FpermPage%3D1&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_end&n=1)
We're proud of the campaign we ran, and we're proud to have your support. Thanks for everything you did to make sure Ohio sent Rob back to the Senate. \- Team Portman

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_end&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_end&n=3)[

](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Frobportman.com%2Fdonate&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_end&n=4)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_end&n=5). -=-=-
